sectors.news_driver: India's Fuel Exports Fall To Near Four-Year Low As US-Iran War Disrupts Energy Trade

stocks.name: Indian Oil Corporation
stocks.reason: US-Iran war -> disruption in global energy trade -> reduced fuel exports and potential margin squeeze for IOC

stocks.name: Hindustan Petroleum
stocks.reason: US-Iran war -> reduced fuel exports -> decreased revenue for HINDPETRO

stocks.name: NTPC
stocks.reason: No direct impact from US-Iran war on NTPC's operations -> stable energy demand -> neutral stock impact

sectors.news_driver: Milk supply situation comfortable; no intention to hike retail prices: Mother Dairy chairman

stocks.name: Mother Dairy
stocks.reason: Comfortable milk supply situation -> no price hike -> increased demand and revenue for Mother Dairy

stocks.name: Nestle India
stocks.reason: Stable milk prices -> reduced input costs -> increased margins for NESTLEIND
